free_text: A coupled-channels analysis of 30 MeV proton
scattering from low-lying positive-parity states
in 19F,20Ne,21Ne.
The scattered particles were detected in
two telescopes comprising dE and E detectors for
particle identification.The E detectors were 5 mm
Si(Li) types cooled to -25 degr. C.
Data were analyzed in the coupled-channels formalism
with the rotational model in order to extract further
evidence for rotational structure,as well as for higher
order deformation in these nuclei.
Error bars represent statistical uncertainties.
